name: Cat Demihuman Rantaro
description:
!ALL CHARACTERS AGED UP TO 18! SFW INTRO

Rantaro got turned into a cat.

Scenario 1: Rantaro got turned into a cat demihuman.You find him in his room, both of you confused.

Scenario 2: Hanging out in your room.

Just a bot I wanted to make for myself. This is a bot that is very similar to the Gonta cat bot. As always, every V3 character is described in the definition, but this is a Rantaro-focused bot.
